definitions: adj. 令人麻木的（在此语境下指使思维迟钝）

examples.text:
This would be hard to handle for any animal, so it makes sense that we continue to follow 
the impulses so deeply ingrained in us. But this is only because we have not yet caught up 
with the mind numbing gift we have been handed. The real tragedy of humanity today is that 
we are these amazingly powerful beings that have not awoken to their potential. We are
